name: l2_powered_source_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRunMatrix records current skipped and future pending powered-source run status without fabricating live force-moment evidence.
note: Execution-status packet for future A4MC powered-source runs.

name: l2_powered_source_request_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestReadinessGate must open before any powered-source run can be pending.
note: Readiness gate for source API acceptance and request envelopes.

name: l2_powered_source_request_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestPlan supplies the hover and cruise source request envelopes consumed by this run matrix.
note: Request geometry and source-map target inventory.

name: l2_bridge
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge can run static L2 force moment probes but currently has no powered source-term request surface.
note: Current live-run boundary for A4MC L2 integration.

name: l2_powered_hover_validation
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverValidation defines baseline-subtracted hover force and moment acceptance.
note: Hover validation target for future live run output.

name: l2_powered_cruise_validation
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseValidation defines baseline-subtracted cruise force moment and center-of-force acceptance.
note: Cruise validation target for future live run output.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered body-force or porous-source request support.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered source execution.
